name: Discharge of Federal Tax Liens via Judicial Sale

eligibility.description: Purchasers or creditors involved in judicial sales of property where the US was not joined as a party and no tax lien was properly filed at the time of commencement.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows for the discharge or divestment of a federal tax lien through a judicial sale if the IRS failed to file a notice of lien before the action commenced.
